titleStmt.title: SII 18.181: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 181. (B.K. No. 184 of 1933-34.) NIḌŌṆI, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the east wall of the Hanumantadēva temple.

summary.p: This inscription, referring itself to the reign of Rāyamurāri Sōyidēva, is dated in the 4th year of his reign, Vikṛita, Āshāḍha śu. 11, Friday, Dakshināyana-saṁkramaṇa, corresponding to A.D., 1170 June 26, Friday. The saṁkrānti however fell on the following Saturday. The king is stated to be ruling from his capital Mōdiganūr.

It states that a certain Brahmin named Viraṇa reconstructed the temples of Sūrya and Gavarēśvara at Niḍuvaṇi which is called uttamad-agrahāra. It records a gift of money made by Bandhudēva, son of Piriya Sōvarasa, for the recitation of Sauparṇa in the shrine of Sōmanāthadēva. The coins Lokki-priyaśrāhi-gadyāṇa and Lokkiya-vīsa are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīramaṇīmanōramaṇaniṁdra
pramōditaṁ vārijagarbhbhasūkti
namaṇḍitanindujūṭasasmēramukhāravindamakaranda
mukhanacyutajayaśrīramaṇaṁ jagatṛ
tayamaṁ parirakṣisutirkke santataṁ © svasti samastabhuva
nāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramē
śvaraṁ kāḷāṁjarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ . suvarṇnavṛṣabhadhvajaṁ
mūrttimakaradhvajaṁ . subhaṭarādityaṁ nāmādisamasta
praśastisahitaṁ śrīmatu kaḷacuryacakravartti rāyamurā
ri sōyidēvaru mōdiganūra nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
diṁ rājyageyuttamirddalli . © vinayave mūrttigoṇḍudu ne
gaḷte pogaḷteyanappukeydudatyanupamadāna sapha
līkṛtavādudu vipravamśaṁ ciranavōditōditakke nele
yādudenuttave kūḍe viścamēdini pogaḷalke vīraṇanupārjjisidaṁ
guṇadaṁkamāleyaṁ . © poḍavige ratnabhūṣaṇavidabhina
vōttamadagrahāravī niḍuvaṇiyalli sūryagṛhamaṁ
gavarēśvaramaṁ nirākuḷaṁ keḍadoḍedirdduvaṁ maguḷe māḍisi vīra
ṇanudhghakīrttiyaṁ paḍedaneṁdaṁte dal paḍeyadirppare sa
tpuruṣargguṇaṁgaḷaṁ . © Eṁba permmege tavarmmane
yuṁ . brāhmyakuḷake tiḷakamuṁ . vāṁgirasa bāruha
spatya bhāradvāja gōtrakamaḷinige kaḷahaṁsavenisi .
maprabhu piriya sōvarasana maga baṁdhudēvaṁ . svasti ya
maniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhā
najapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannarappa śrīmaduttama
dagrahāraṁ niḍuvaṇiyūroḍeya pra
mukhavaśēṣamahājanaṁgaḷa sannidhānadalu . śrīmatkaḷacu
ryyacakravartti rāyamarāri sōyidēvavarṣada 4 ne
ya vikṛtasaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍha suddha 11 śukravāradaṁ
du dakṣiṇāyanasaṁkramaṇa parvvanimittaṁ kāḷiyaviṣṇu
gṛhada janārddanadēvaralliya sōmanāthadēvara sannidhā
nadalpēḷva sauparṇnake koṭṭa lokkipriyaśrāhi gadyā
ṇa 4 Ācavvegaḷkoṭṭa gadyāṇa 2 Antu gadyāṇa
6 maṁ poṁge tiṁgaḷiṁge lokkiya vīsa 5 A
ddhiyiṁ susthaḷavāgi koṭṭa taḷāntadiṁdā sauparṇnama
namāvāsye paurṇnamāvāsyeyoḷpēḷva
brāhmaṇara tāṁbūḷakke koṭṭa nīdha
roḍeyaruṁ mahājanaṁgaḷuṁ
pratipāḷisuvaru ©
Digital edition of SII 18.181 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
